rules.title: README required
rules.message: README.md is required
rules.description: The target repo should have a README.md.

rules.title: Agent instructions required
rules.message: AGENTS.md is required
rules.description: The target repo should have an AGENTS.md.

rules.title: CI workflow required
rules.message: .github/workflows must contain at least one .yml or .yaml workflow
rules.description: The target repo should have a CI workflow under .github/workflows.

rules.title: Slophammer enforcement required
rules.message: CI must run a Slophammer checker when slophammer.yml is present
rules.description: A repository that carries slophammer.yml must execute a Slophammer checker from binding CI evidence; config without enforcement is decoration.

rules.title: Go module required
rules.message: Go projects must include a go.mod file
rules.description: Go projects should be Go modules.

rules.title: Go tests required
rules.message: Go projects must declare go test ./... in CI or scripts
rules.description: Go projects should run go test against ./... in an inspectable workflow or script.

rules.title: Go vet required
rules.message: Go projects must declare go vet ./... in CI or scripts
rules.description: Go projects should run go vet ./... in an inspectable workflow or script.

rules.title: Go lint required
rules.message: Go projects must configure and declare golangci-lint
rules.description: Go projects should configure golangci-lint and declare a lint check in CI or scripts.

rules.title: Go coverage gate required
rules.message: Go projects must declare a coverage gate
rules.description: Go projects should enforce coverage with go test coverage output, go tool cover, and a minimum threshold.

rules.title: Go complexity linting required
rules.message: Go projects must enable a complexity linter
rules.description: Go projects should enable a complexity linter through golangci-lint.

rules.title: Go DRY check required
rules.message: Go projects must declare a DRY check
rules.description: Go projects should declare Slophammer's unified DRY check for structural and copied-block duplicate detection.

rules.title: Go CRAP check required
rules.message: Go projects must declare crap4go with a threshold
rules.description: Go projects should declare crap4go with a threshold for complexity and coverage risk scoring.

rules.title: Go mutation check required
rules.message: Go projects must declare mutate4go
rules.description: Go projects should declare mutate4go in an inspectable workflow or script. Only executing invocations count: list, scan, check, dry-run, and manifest-only forms cannot fail on a surviving mutant and are not evidence. mutate4go exits zero even when mutants survive, so only the gating slophammer-go wrapper counts.

rules.title: Go dependency boundaries required
rules.message: Go projects must respect configured dependency boundaries
rules.description: Go projects should keep imports inside the dependency boundaries declared in slophammer.yml.

rules.title: Go scope completeness
rules.message: Configured Go scope must cover all production files or exclude them with reasons
rules.description: Every production Go file must be in configured scope or covered by a conventional or reasoned exclude, so findings cannot be hidden by narrowing scope.

rules.title: Go suppressions justified
rules.message: nolint directives in production Go code must carry a reason
rules.description: A //nolint directive in production scope must carry a trailing // reason comment; bare suppressions accumulate silently.

rules.title: TypeScript package required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must include package.json
rules.description: TypeScript projects should include package.json.

rules.title: TypeScript typecheck required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must declare a no-emit typecheck in CI or scripts
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare tsc, tsgo, or an equivalent no-emit typecheck.

rules.title: TypeScript strict mode required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must enable strict mode
rules.description: TypeScript projects should enable strict compiler settings.

rules.title: No explicit any
rules.message: TypeScript projects must reject explicit any
rules.description: TypeScript projects should configure lint rules to reject explicit any.

rules.title: No unsafe type operations
rules.message: TypeScript projects must reject unsafe type operations
rules.description: TypeScript projects should configure lint rules to reject unsafe assignments, calls, member access, and returns.

rules.title: TypeScript lint required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must declare a linter in CI or scripts
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare ESLint, Oxlint, Biome, or an equivalent linter.

rules.title: TypeScript formatter required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must declare a formatter check
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare a formatter check through Prettier, Oxfmt, Biome, Dprint, or an equivalent tool.

rules.title: TypeScript tests required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must declare tests in CI or scripts
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare a real test runner command.

rules.title: TypeScript coverage gate required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must declare a coverage gate
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare a coverage gate with a target of at least 85.

rules.title: TypeScript complexity required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must enforce complexity limits
rules.description: TypeScript projects should enforce complexity limits through a configured linter.

rules.title: TypeScript DRY check required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must declare a DRY check
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare Slophammer's native copied-block duplicate detector.

rules.title: TypeScript mutation check required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must declare mutation testing
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare TypeScript mutation testing, normally through StrykerJS. Only executing invocations count: list, scan, check, dry-run, and manifest-only forms cannot fail on a surviving mutant and are not evidence. Stryker exits zero on surviving mutants unless thresholds.break is set, so runs count only beside a positive breaking threshold.

rules.title: TypeScript dependency boundaries required
rules.message: TypeScript projects must respect configured dependency boundaries
rules.description: TypeScript projects should declare dependency boundaries in slophammer.yml and keep imports inside them.

rules.title: TypeScript scope completeness
rules.message: Configured TypeScript scope must cover all production files or exclude them with reasons
rules.description: Every production TypeScript file must be in configured scope or covered by a conventional or reasoned exclude, so findings cannot be hidden by narrowing scope.

rules.title: TypeScript suppressions justified
rules.message: lint and type suppressions in production TypeScript code must carry a description
rules.description: eslint-disable, @ts-ignore, @ts-expect-error, biome-ignore, and oxlint-disable directives in production scope must carry a description; bare suppressions accumulate silently.

rules.title: Rust manifest required
rules.message: Rust projects must include Cargo.toml
rules.description: Rust projects should include a Cargo manifest.

rules.title: Rust MSRV required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare a minimum supported Rust version
rules.description: Rust projects should declare a minimum supported Rust version.

rules.title: Rust cargo check required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare cargo check in CI or scripts
rules.description: Rust projects should declare cargo check in an inspectable workflow or script.

rules.title: Rust formatter required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare cargo fmt --check in CI or scripts
rules.description: Rust projects should declare cargo fmt --check in CI or scripts.

rules.title: Rust Clippy required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare cargo clippy in CI or scripts
rules.description: Rust projects should declare cargo clippy with warnings denied.

rules.title: Rust tests required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare cargo test in CI or scripts
rules.description: Rust projects should declare cargo test in CI or scripts.

rules.title: Rust coverage gate required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare a coverage gate
rules.description: Rust projects should declare an enforceable coverage gate.

rules.title: Rust complexity required
rules.message: Rust projects must enforce complexity limits
rules.description: Rust projects should enforce complexity limits through Clippy or Slophammer policy.

rules.title: Rust DRY check required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare a DRY check
rules.description: Rust projects should declare Slophammer's native Rust DRY check.

rules.title: Rust mutation check required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare mutation testing
rules.description: Rust projects should declare mutation testing, normally through cargo-mutants. Only executing invocations count: list, scan, check, dry-run, and manifest-only forms cannot fail on a surviving mutant and are not evidence.

rules.title: Rust unsafe policy required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare and respect an unsafe-code policy
rules.description: Rust projects should declare and respect an unsafe-code policy in slophammer.yml.

rules.title: Rust dependency audit required
rules.message: Rust projects must declare dependency audit checks
rules.description: Rust projects should declare cargo audit or cargo deny.

rules.title: Rust dependency boundaries required
rules.message: Rust projects must respect configured dependency boundaries
rules.description: Rust projects should declare dependency boundaries in slophammer.yml and keep local dependencies inside them.

rules.title: Rust scope completeness
rules.message: Configured Rust scope must cover all production files or exclude them with reasons
rules.description: Every production Rust file must be in configured scope or covered by a conventional or reasoned exclude, so findings cannot be hidden by narrowing scope.

rules.title: Rust suppressions justified
rules.message: allow attributes in production Rust code must carry a reason
rules.description: An #[allow(...)] attribute in production scope must carry an adjacent // reason comment or use #[expect(..., reason = "...")]; bare suppressions accumulate silently.

rules.title: Python project metadata required
rules.message: Python projects must declare a pyproject.toml
rules.description: Production Python code needs project metadata in pyproject.toml.

rules.title: Python typecheck required
rules.message: Python projects must run a typechecker (ty, mypy, or pyright) in CI
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must invoke a Python typechecker.

rules.title: Strict Python typing required
rules.message: Python typechecking must be strict
rules.description: The typechecker configuration must make annotations mandatory and must not be quietly weakened: no unreasoned demotion of stable default-error ty rules, error-on-warning enabled, the ignore-default correctness rules promoted, coded suppressions only, and Ruff ANN annotation coverage.

rules.title: Python lint required
rules.message: Python projects must run a linter (ruff check) in CI
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must invoke a Python linter.

rules.title: Python format check required
rules.message: Python projects must verify formatting (ruff format --check or black --check) in CI
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must verify formatting without mutating files.

rules.title: Python tests required
rules.message: Python projects must run tests (pytest) in CI
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must run the Python test suite.

rules.title: Python coverage gate required
rules.message: Python projects must enforce a coverage gate of at least 85
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must enforce coverage, via --cov-fail-under or a fail_under coverage configuration of at least the configured threshold.

rules.title: Python complexity gate required
rules.message: Python projects must enforce complexity at most 8 (Ruff C901 or radon)
rules.description: Complexity must be capped at the configured maximum.

rules.title: Python DRY check required
rules.message: Python projects must declare a DRY check
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must run a duplication check (slophammer-py dry).

rules.title: Python mutation testing required
rules.message: Python projects must declare mutation testing (mutmut or cosmic-ray)
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must declare a mutation testing tool. Only executing invocations count: list, scan, check, dry-run, and manifest-only forms cannot fail on a surviving mutant and are not evidence. mutmut and cosmic-ray exec exit zero even when mutants survive, so runs count only beside a kill-rate gate (--min-kill-rate or cr-rate --fail-over).

rules.title: Justified Python suppressions required
rules.message: Python suppressions must carry a reason: bare # noqa, # type: ignore without an error code, or uncommented # ty: ignore
rules.description: Suppression directives in production Python code need a stated reason; bare # type: ignore without an error code is itself a finding.

rules.title: Python dependency audit required
rules.message: Python projects must audit dependencies (pip-audit or uv audit) in CI
rules.description: Binding CI evidence must audit Python dependencies.

rules.title: Python dependency boundaries required
rules.message: Python imports must respect the configured dependency boundaries
rules.description: When python.dependency_boundaries is configured, imports crossing a boundary outside its allow list are findings.

rules.title: py.typed marker required
rules.message: Published Python packages must ship a py.typed marker
rules.description: A project that builds a published package must ship the py.typed marker, or its checked types degrade to Any for every consumer.

rules.title: Complete Python scope required
rules.message: Configured Python scope must cover all production files or exclude them with reasons
rules.description: Every production Python file must be inside a configured scope or covered by a conventional or reasoned exclude, so narrowing scope cannot hide code.

rules.title: Absolute Python imports required
rules.message: Python imports must be absolute; replace relative imports (ruff check --select TID252 --fix)
rules.description: Relative imports defeat grep, break on file moves, and read as dot-counting at depth; production imports must name the package. Ruff's TID252 autofix converts a whole repository in one command.
